name: The Dedication of the Lateran Basilica in Rome

sections.title: The House that Love Is Building
sections.author: Sarah Hart
sections.snippet: In the house that Love is building there is room enough for all, endless welcome in her rafters, mercy singing through her walls. Here is refuge for all people from every tribe and tongue. In the house that Love is building there is room for everyone.

sections.title: Psalm 46: 2-3, 5-6, 8-9
sections.snippet: The waters of the river gladden the city of God, the holy dwelling of the Most High!
I have chosen and consecrated this house, says the Lord, that my name may be there forever.
sections.title: 2 Chronicles 7:16
Flow River Flow
sections.author: Bob Hurd
sections.snippet: Flow river flow, flow over me. O living water, poured out for free; O living water, flow over me.

sections.author: John W. Thompson, Randy Scruggs
sections.snippet: Lord, prepare me to be a sanctuary; pure and holy; tried and true. With thanksgiving; I'll be a living Sanctuary for You.
sections.title: Sanctuary
A Place at Your Table
sections.author: Ben Walther
sections.snippet: Happy the ones whom you call here to dine, the saint and the sinner, your friends. Now reconciled in this banquet divine, the promise of life without end, the promise of life without end.

sections.title: As the Deer Longs
sections.author: Bob Hurd
sections.snippet: As the deer longs for running streams, so I long, so I long, so I long for you.

sections.title: Go Make a Difference
sections.author: Steve Angrisano / Tom Tomaszek
sections.snippet: Go make a diff'rence. We can make a diff'rence. Go make a diff'rence in the world. Go make a diff'rence. We can make a diff'rence. Go make a diff'rence in the world.

sections.author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
sections.snippet: Lord have mercy! Christ have mercy! Lord have mercy!

sections.author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
sections.snippet: Glory to God! Glory to God in the highest, and on earth, peace to people of goodwill.

sections.author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
sections.snippet: Holy, holy, holy Lord God of hosts. Heaven and earth are full of your glory. Hosanna in the highest. Blessed is he who comes in the moment of the Lord. Hosanna in the highest.

sections.author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
sections.snippet: When we eat this breadand drink this cup, we proclaim your death, O Lord, until you come again.

sections.author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
sections.snippet: Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.
